opengravity.provider.description: AI API Provider (Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp server, or generic OpenAI-compatible local endpoint)

opengravity.url.description: URL of the local server (Ollama: 11434, LM Studio: 1234)

opengravity.systemPrompt.description: Custom global instructions appended to the agent's absolute system prompt

opengravity.temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Lower is more deterministic for coding.

opengravity.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for each chat turn.

opengravity.contextLength.description: Model context window for chat/tool use (Ollama num_ctx).

opengravity.agentMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-iteration steps per chat request

opengravity.maxReadFileBytes.description: Maximum file bytes the read_file tool returns in one call

opengravity.enableTerminalTool.description: Allow the agent to run terminal commands in the workspace root

opengravity.terminalCommandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for run_terminal_command tool in milliseconds

opengravity.includeHiddenFilesInList.description: Include dotfiles in list_files tool output

opengravity.enableNativeToolCalling.description: Enable native function-calling when the selected local provider/model supports it

opengravity.repeatPenalty.description: Repeat penalty to reduce loops/repetition (primarily Ollama).

opengravity.presencePenalty.description: Presence penalty for OpenAI-compatible backends that support it.

opengravity.frequencyPenalty.description: Frequency penalty for OpenAI-compatible backends that support it.

opengravity.seed.description: Seed for more reproducible generations. Set -1 to let backend choose randomness.

opengravity.autocompleteContextLength.description: Characters of prefix context sent for inline completion.

opengravity.autocompleteMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for inline completion.

opengravity.autocompleteDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay for inline completion requests in milliseconds.

opengravity.presetProfile.description: Named tuning preset. This is updated when you run OpenGravity: Apply Preset.
